commanded_lines: Action envelope: read-only validation; write only workers/validator-dkr-p4/verification.v1.json and progress.finish.json; no product, git, frame, tree, ledger, release, or external-state changes.
Validation decision: all frozen hashes, predeclaration controls, retained in-heap batch metadata, one-shot replay values, and saved no-repeat evidence are accepted for reducing discovery only.

Downstream decision: the dedicated-leaf calibration method may inform a separately governed product measurement PKR; CKR performance, product allocation claims, retained-memory claims, and optimization remain blocked.
DKRs are discovery-worker scopes; PKRs are progression-worker execution units; there is no CKR worker.
